chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2247 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.1115/2017 3. For hearing of main case 27.01.2025 Mr. Ghulam Haider Shaikh, advocate for the petitioners Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for respondent Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali advocate holds brief for Mirza Nadeem Taqi, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that this petition may be disposed off in the following terms. i. The show cause notice impugned herein shall be adjudicated, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, vide a speaking order. ii. The petitioner shall remain at liberty to assail the determinant order before the statutory hierarchy, if aggrieved, pending adjudication of the show cause notice, the department will not take any further coercive action against the petitioner. By consent, the instant petition is disposed off in the above terms. Judge Judge Amjad
